caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" on the chest, a black baseball cap with gold embroidery, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He wears a gold chain and a bracelet on his right wrist. He is seated in a studio setting with a white wall behind him featuring a logo with stars and the word "HUSTLE." To his right is a dark background with the text "BOSS TALK 101." Overlaid on the bottom corners of the scene are logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He begins with his hand raised and open, then slightly lowers and closes his fingers as he continues talking, while his facial expression remains focused and engaged.
